input.description: Render direct media function-like inputs

content.content:
1-## Change Log
2-
3:### v4.4.1 (2025-07-25)
4-
5-- [#4342](https://github.com/less/less.js/pull/4342) Add support for CSS scroll state container queries (@puckowski)
--
39-- [#3700](https://github.com/less/less.js/pull/3700) parsing variables fail when there is no trailing semicolon (@b-kelly)
40-- [#3719](https://github.com/less/less.js/pull/3719) modify `this` pointer so that it is not empty. (@lumburr)
41:- [#3649](https://github.com/less/less.js/pull/3649) fixes [#2991](https://github.com/less/less.js/issues/2991) empty @media queries generated when compiling less file with (reference) to bootstrap (@MoonCoral)
42-
43-### v4.1.3 (2022-06-09)
--
171-
172-### v3.5.3 (2018-07-06)
173:- [#3272](https://github.com/less/less.js/pull/3272) Reverts operations not being performed in media queries (@matthew-dean)
174-- [#3257](https://github.com/less/less.js/pull/3257) Fixes #3182 (@matthew-dean)
175-
--
427-- [#2128](https://github.com/less/less.js/pull/2128) Mixin wrongly called (@SomMeri, @obecker, @dhaber)
428-- [#2144](https://github.com/less/less.js/pull/2144) Updating request dependency (@pdehaan)
429:- [#2123](https://github.com/less/less.js/pull/2123) Import into media 1645 (@SomMeri, @obecker, @dhaber)
430-
431-### v1.7.4 (2014-07-27)
--
559-- [#879](https://github.com/less/less.js/pull/879) Allow numbers and underscores in attribute selectors (@dmcass)
560-- [#857](https://github.com/less/less.js/pull/857) Revert adding "transparent" as a color name (@clmsnskr)
561:- [#753](https://github.com/less/less.js/pull/753) Adding "dpi" as a valid dimensions for media queries (@clarkni5)
562-- [#800](https://github.com/less/less.js/pull/800) Added 'transparent' as a named color (@SpadarShut)
563-- [#804](https://github.com/less/less.js/pull/804) Fix for unnamed parameters test fail & failing test for import-once (@jreading)
--
567-### v1.3.0 (2012-03-10)
568-- [#673](https://github.com/less/less.js/pull/673) mocha found a couple global variable leaks. Here's the fix. (@andrewjstone)
569:- [#634](https://github.com/less/less.js/pull/634) Add @media bubbling/nesting/merging (@NDMarcel)
570-- [#631](https://github.com/less/less.js/pull/631) Fixed spelling error on benchmark/less-benchmark.js (@highergroundstudio)
571-- [#601](https://github.com/less/less.js/pull/601) Make parse error handler more robust (@adrianheine)
